title: Design Database Schema & Terraform Plan
description: Define VPC networking requirements, security groups, and RDS parameter groups. Create Terraform module structure.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: VPC/Subnet architecture diagram approved; Terraform plan output validated

title: Implement RDS Terraform Module with pgvector
description: Write Terraform code to provision RDS Postgres 15+. Include rds_master_user_password management via Secrets Manager. Configure pgvector extension.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: RDS instance provisioned in private subnet; pgvector enabled; Secrets in ASM

title: Define Event Topology & Schema Registry
description: Map out all topics (SowUploaded, PayoutSuccessful, etc.). Define JSON schemas for event payloads using Zod or Avro. Plan DLQ strategy.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: List of SNS Topics/SQS Subscriptions defined; Schemas documented

title: Implement SNS/SQS Terraform Modules
description: Write IaC to provision Topics, Queues, DLQs, and Subscription bindings based on the defined topology.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Topics/Queues provisioned; DLQ redrive policy configured; IAM policies active

title: Develop S3 Multipart Upload Service
description: Implement NestJS service using aws-sdk to handle multipart streaming uploads to S3.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Files >10MB stream successfully; Low memory footprint; Secure keys

title: Implement Upload Controller & Validation
description: Create Controller with FileInterceptor. Add ParseFilePipe for validation (PDF/DOCX, Max 10MB). Sanitize filenames.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Invalid types rejected; Oversized files rejected; Filenames sanitized

title: Implement Transactional State & Event Publishing
description: Wrap DB update and Event Publication (SNS SowUploaded) in a logical transaction. Handle rollback on failure.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: DB record matches S3 state; Event published on success only; Audit log generated
definition_of_done: Integration tests passing for transaction rollbacks

title: Implement SQS Consumer & Idempotency Logic
description: Set up NestJS microservice with SQS strategy. Implement idempotency check (DB status != PENDING). Handle message ACKs/NACKs.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Reliable consumption; Duplicates ignored; NACKs for retryable errors

title: Implement File Retrieval & Text Extraction
description: Download file from S3 using key. Extract raw text content from PDF/DOCX using pdf-parse/mammoth.
sprint_goal: Establish Core Infrastructure and SOW Ingestion Pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Text extracted accurately; Corrupted files handled; Memory optimized
definition_of_done: Extraction logic validated against sample corpus

title: Stripe Service Wrapper & Customer Management

definition_of_done: Service integration tests passing against Stripe Sandbox

title: Implement Split-Pane Layout & PDF Viewer
